title: Terraria — East-Side Field Guide
description: Every weapon, armor set, and accessory still left to collect on the east side of my Corruption world, organized by zone. Jungle, desert, ocean, sky. A checklist for clearing what remains before heading west.

title: Terraria — Progress Tracker
description: A living document tracking my first Terraria playthrough session by session. Character state, gear, bosses, infrastructure, and what happened each night. Updated as I play.

title: Terraria — Hardmode Crafting Card
description: A filterable reference for everything I'm crafting in early Hardmode: mechanical boss summons, wings, weapons, tools, the Tinkerer accessory chains, and the materials each one needs. Built for my Corruption world.

title: Glock 43X — Complete Owner's Guide
description: Every system, every maintenance interval, every decision point. The Safe Action system, field strip procedure, lubrication points, holster considerations, Oklahoma law, ammunition. All of it in one place.

title: Lawn and tree care plan for Yukon, OK
description: Bermuda grass management and elm tree care specific to central Oklahoma. Soil chemistry, pest cycles, seasonal timing. An 11-page month-by-month reference.
